## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New assessment query
- [ ] Query fix / update
- [ ] Workbook UI change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Workbook JSON is valid (`python -c "import json; json.load(open('workbook/ai-readiness-assessment.workbook'))"`)
- [ ] ARM template regenerated (if workbook changed)
- [ ] New queries tested against Azure Resource Graph
- [ ] `docs/QUERIES.md` updated (if queries changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
